strengths: Extensive full-stack experience with TypeScript, Node.js, and React across multiple enterprises
Proven expertise in AI-agent infrastructure and MCP code generators at re:cinq
Strong DevOps and infrastructure skills including Docker, Kubernetes, GitLab CI, and AWS CDK
concerns: No explicit mention of Nest.js or Vitest in resume, key required stack components
Limited evidence of Kotlin or Java production use beyond legacy/academic roles
German language proficiency is only basic, may hinder collaboration in Berlin-based enterprise team
response.justification: The candidate demonstrates 6+ years of full-stack experience with TypeScript, Node.js, and React, plus direct AI-agent infrastructure work at re:cinq — aligning strongly with core responsibilities. However, Nest.js and Vitest, explicitly required in the stack, are never mentioned, and while Java/Kotlin appear in past roles, there’s no evidence of current or production use. His DevOps and architecture skills are exceptional, but the absence of key stack technologies raises risk in adoption speed.
